title: Two Sum
description: Find the indices of the two numbers in an array that add up to a target, given exactly one valid pair.
io: Stdin is two lines: line 1 is space-separated integers, line 2 is the target integer; there is exactly one pair of distinct indices whose values sum to the target. Stdout is those two 0-based indices in ascending order, space-separated (e.g. "0 1").
